map: DOCUMENTED-from-frames+minimaps: the UNDEAD LAIR — a maze of grey/white CHECKERED-tile CORRIDORS with yellow/gold accent tiles, winding to a CENTRAL RED/MAROON boss CHAMBER (cross/plus-shaped) where Septavius is fought. Choke-point corridors approach the central chamber. Compact single-dungeon layout (not multi-biome).
